name: build-harmony-apps
description: Build HarmonyOS apps with DevEco CodeGenie, DevEco CLI, ArkTS and ArkUI workflows for debugging, Kit integration, preview, profiling, release compliance, testing, and refactoring.

interface.shortDescription: Build, integrate, profile, release, test, and debug HarmonyOS apps with ArkTS, ArkUI, and DevEco workflows
interface.longDescription: Use Build Harmony Apps to create projects, build and run apps, inspect and automate device UI, diagnose ArkTS failures, integrate HarmonyOS Kits with permission evidence, preview multi-device layouts, implement native ArkUI patterns, prepare AppGallery releases, triage tests, analyze DevEco Profiler traces, and prove fixes with before/after evidence.
defaultPrompt: Build, integrate, debug, or prepare this HarmonyOS app for release with ArkTS, ArkUI, and DevEco tools.
